message:
feat: add allow_pickle param + validate structured payload length

- Add allow_pickle parameter to read_npz_bytes and load_npz for pickle
  policy control
- Validate structured payload byte count matches expected record footprint
- Add conformance tests for object dtype handling and truncated payloads
- Expand IO differential test cases with magic/header/dtype edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -769,5 +769,218 @@

+  },
